specific_question: What was the average duration Elexion Automotive's dealers spent on vehicle orientation and infotainment training during customer delivery in 2024, and how much time was dedicated to connectivity features?
answer: In 2024, Elexion Automotive dealers spent an average of 45 minutes on vehicle orientation and infotainment training during customer delivery, with only 12 minutes specifically dedicated to connectivity features.
dr_question: What impact would a 20% increase in dealer-led customer education on EV infotainment and connectivity features have on reducing service visit frequency by 2027?
